h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: Continual rehearsal of the same mapping between time-signature components and physical tokens, matching the table to the staff.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner repeats the same sorting and matching operation across all turns without performing any new device, criterion, or representation.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no pressure from a learner turn causing a breakdown; the tutor simply sustains the same checklist procedure throughout.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn exists, and no later tutor turn adapts to a revised learner framing; the tutor merely repeats the same instructions.

learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner repeats the same sorting and matching operation across all turns without performing any new device, criterion, or representation.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn exists, and no later tutor turn adapts to a revised learner framing; the tutor merely repeats the same instructions.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no pressure from a learner turn causing a breakdown; the tutor simply sustains the same checklist procedure throughout.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no pressure from a learner turn causing a breakdown; the tutor simply sustains the same checklist procedure throughout.

scored.naiveTrajectory: After sorting labels by source, the learner would place the friction arrow based on contact direction, then place the normal arrow similarly.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Normal goes here too, at the contact. Up on the cart, perpendicular to the table.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: Learner applies the contact-source criterion to correctly place the normal arrow, performing the expected task.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: Tutor follows a planned sequence of prompting for arrow placement; no pressure to change approach.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: No pivot learner turn to elicit contingent uptake.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Normal goes here too, at the contact. Up on the cart, perpendicular to the table.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: Learner applies the contact-source criterion to correctly place the normal arrow, performing the expected task.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: No pivot learner turn to elicit contingent uptake.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: Tutor follows a planned sequence of prompting for arrow placement; no pressure to change approach.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: Tutor follows a planned sequence of prompting for arrow placement; no pressure to change approach.
